Description: Verify all regulatory clinical privacy security payments video notification accessibility and ops readiness for a teleconsultation service before production. Full detail in docs/qa/ProductionReadinessBacklog.md.

Summary: Display doctor RMP registration number and qualifications
Description: Telemedicine Guidelines: RMP identity must be shown on profile and at point of consult. Add reg number + qualifications; verify displayed to patient.

Summary: Enforce prescription drug restrictions (no controlled / Schedule X)
Description: Block controlled substances/Schedule X/narcotics via teleconsult; enforce List O/A/B rules and refill limits. Currently free-form medicine list with no schedule guard.

Summary: Digitally-signed prescription in a legal verifiable format
Description: Issued Rx must carry a legally valid signature/format. Today Rx is structured+locked but unsigned.
Consent versioning exists; verify wording is compliant with Telemedicine Guidelines and captured per consult with timestamp/source.

Summary: Patient identity verification at first consult
Description: Capture/verify patient name/age/ID at first consult per guidelines. Today only profile fields exist.

Summary: Minor patients — guardian identity and consent flow
Description: Pediatric consults need guardian identity + consent. Not implemented.

Summary: Medical-records retention policy and enforced purge
Description: Define statutory retention period for records/Rx/reports and enforce deletion afterwards.

Summary: Publish and enforce refund and cancellation policy
Description: Consultation refund policy is undecided; decide publish and enforce in-product (Care-plan refund already exists).

Summary: Publish grievance redressal / Data Protection Officer contact
Description: DPDP requires a published grievance/DPO contact channel. Not present.
Document and surface the practitioner's duty to escalate to ER/in-person when teleconsult is unsafe.

Summary: Legal review of ToS Privacy and Refund documents
Description: Terms/Privacy pages exist; get them (and refund policy) reviewed by a healthcare lawyer and kept current.
Define policy for where the doctor is licensed vs where the patient is located.

Summary: Sign DPA/BAA with every data processor
Description: Signed data-processing agreements with LiveKit Razorpay Resend Neon realtime-host Sentry.

Summary: Verify encryption at rest for DB and attachments
Description: Confirm DB and report/chat attachment (bytea) data is encrypted at rest.

Summary: Data localization — health data stored in India
Description: Health data currently in Neon Singapore region; assess India localization requirement or document lawful basis.
Record who viewed which record/Rx/report and when. pino logs are not an access audit trail.

Summary: Data-subject rights access export erasure workflow
Description: Provide access/export/erasure of personal data per DPDP.
Define breach detection + notification within DPDP timelines.

Summary: Data retention/minimization and scheduled purge job
Description: Minimize stored data and schedule purge of expired records.

Summary: No PHI/PII in logs Sentry or analytics
Description: Verify scrubbing so no personal/health data leaks into logs error reports or analytics.
Capture processing consent and allow withdrawal.

Summary: Not-for-emergencies disclaimer on every entry point (verify)
Description: Verify red-flag triage + not-for-emergencies disclaimer appears on all entry points.

Summary: Documented escalation pathway to ER / in-person
Description: Define and surface how a consult escalates to emergency/in-person care.

Summary: Drug allergy and interaction check at prescribing
Description: Warn on allergy/interaction against patient profile when composing Rx.
List conditions unsuitable for teleconsult and surface them.

Summary: Continuity of care referral and handoff mechanism
Description: Provide referral/handoff to another provider.

Summary: SOAP mandatory before Rx can be issued (verify enforced)
Description: Verify a completed SOAP note is required before an Rx can be issued.
Capture minimal identity to bind account to a real person.
Verify and store the doctor's medical credentials.
Offer a second authentication factor for high-privilege accounts.

Summary: OTP brute-force rate-limit expiry and lockout
Description: Verify/harden OTP against guessing: rate limit expiry lockout. Login is the front door.
Commission a pen test / security review before launch.
Add SCA/dependency scanning and a patch cadence.

Summary: Secrets management and key rotation policy
Description: Manage secrets safely and define key rotation.

Summary: Rate limiting WAF and DDoS protection
Description: Protect public endpoints against abuse and volumetric attacks.

Summary: Upload validation and malware scan (reports + chat)
Description: Strictly validate and malware-scan uploaded files (currently type check only).

Summary: Security headers and secure cookie flags
Description: Verify CSP/HSTS and Secure/HttpOnly/SameSite cookie flags.
Define and test backups + DR; set RTO/RPO. Neon defaults untested.
Access control exists (token+window); define recording/consent stance (default no recording).
Consult is GST-exempt but platform/convenience fees may not be; ensure correct tax invoicing.

Summary: Doctor payout settlement and reconciliation process
Description: Define how the doctor is paid and reconciled.
Handle chargebacks disputes and refund fraud.
Runbook for webhook-vs-client-callback edge cases and stuck payments.
Confirm no card data touches our servers (Razorpay-hosted) and document PCI scope.

Summary: Poor-network video resilience and reconnection tested
Description: Test low-bandwidth 3G packet-loss reconnection behavior.
Provide a fallback when video cannot connect.
Monitor call quality/failures.

Summary: SMS and WhatsApp channel for OTP/reminders/confirmations
Description: Add SMS/WhatsApp; email-only underperforms for India reach.
Capture consent and provide opt-out for communications.
Ensure reminders aren't duplicated and monitor delivery.
Audit keyboard nav screen-reader support and contrast.
Plan localization for Indian languages.
Design for low-bandwidth elderly and low-literacy users.
Add uptime monitoring alerting and an on-call path.

Summary: Observability verified (Sentry logs metrics no PII)
Description: Verify Sentry captures errors and logs/metrics exist without PII.
Maintain a staging env and a documented rollback procedure.
Provide user support and define an SLA.
Build clinical and business reporting.
Document incident response including data-breach handling.
Monitor infra cost and scaling headroom.
Assess integration with India's national digital health ID (ABHA/ABDM).
Support standards-based record export.
Integrate pharmacy fulfillment and lab diagnostics.
Integrate insurance/claims.
